name_en: 🎉Upgraded 3-in-1🎉1BC151 👏👏 This 3-in-1 handbag is made of imported calf leather, featuring a pure handmade diamond stitching pattern design that looks unique and elegant. It can be worn as a shoulder bag or crossbody 👍👍. I love the small wallet the most; the design has been upgraded, with pockets on both the left and right sides 🙊🙊. This feminine design inspiration makes it simple, elegant, and timeless 😘😘. A bag every woman strives for perfection 😘😘. Get yours now 👏👏. Dimensions: Length 24 x Height 17 x Bottom 7cm
